# perimeter81_network_health (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `network_id` (String) The ID of the standard network to retrieve health status for.

### Read-Only

- `health_checks` (List of Object) The list of health check results for gateways and tunnels in the standard network. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--health_checks))
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedatt--health_checks"></a>
### Nested Schema for `health_checks`

Read-Only:

- `instance_id` (String)
- `network_id` (String)
- `status` (String)
- `tunnel_name` (String)
- `type` (String)
